title: LIBRATON Ratcheting Screwdriver Set, Multi-bit Screwdriver Tool, 33-in-1 Magnetic Ratchet Screw Driver, Slotted/Philips/Pozi/Torx/Hex/Square Bits, Ergonomic Handle for Home, Auto & DIY
features: 3-Driver Ratchet System: Switch effortlessly between clockwise/counter-clockwise/locked modes with the one-handed rotating mechanism. Tackle tight corners effortlessly while reducing wrist strain.

Increase Efficiency: Dual-material PP+TPR handle with anti-slip design ensures precision control and fatigue-free use during marathon projects. Strong magnetic tip keeps bits stay firmly locked during operation, even at awkward angles.

On-board Storage: This ratchet screwdriver is equipped with 32 bits total. Its innovative handle stores up to 12 bits (rotating the end of the handle to get them). The storage base and cover can be separated, letting you customize which bits stay inside for easy access and space-saving portability.

Multi-bit Screwdriver Tool: Includes philips screwdrivers (PH0, PH1, PH2, PH3), slotted screwdriver (SL3, SL4, SL5, SL6), torx screwdriver (T10, T15, T20, T25, T30, T40), hex screwdriver (H3, H4, H5, H6), square screwdriver (SQ1, SQ2, SQ3), pozi screwdriver (PZ1, PZ2, PZ3).

Wide Applications: This multi screwdriver includes essential CR-V steel bits for everyday tasks. Designed for DIYers, mechanics, and homeowners. Repair bikes, assemble furniture, fix electronics, tighten automotive bolts, and more—all with one pro-grade tool.
description: Product Description LIBRATON 33-in-1 Magnetic Ratcheting Screwdriver Set Heat-treated chrome-vanadium (CR-V ) Steel resists stripping, rust, and wear. 3-Driver Ratchet System & Rotating Pull-Out Tail Cap & Built for Heavy-Duty Performance. This multi screwdriver is designed for mechanics, DIYers, and homeowners.
